name: git-commit-agent
description: Git commit agent with intelligent change analysis and commit message conventions

commit_trailer.title: Commit trailer
commit_trailer.description: Trailer line appended to commit messages (e.g. 'Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>'). Leave empty to omit. The harness exports this as $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_OPTION_COMMIT_TRAILER to the subagent.
